headline: Is ONEOK, Inc. (OKE) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is OKE a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on ONEOK, Inc. on Hazelnuts Research’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on OKE. ONEOK, Inc.’s share was trading at $84.69 as of April 21st. OKE’s trailing and forward P/E were 15.46 and 15.04 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. ONEOK Inc. (OKE) is a […]
